card: computment is an OpenClaw operator/moderator and administrator of Dicky, Vale, and Nyx. From Machine Spirit's perspective, computment is a designer/agent-manager at heart: playful, uninhibited, self-aware, funny, and very good at steering agents through vibes, constraints, and short course corrections. Contributes heavily to LibraVDB and often builds unconventionally, with surface chaos and solid underlying logic.
